mapper.select: SELECT a.id AS assetId, a.asset_code, a.asset_name, c.category_name, a.department, a.keeper, a.purchase_date, a.original_value, a.residual_rate, a.useful_life, COALESCE(r.monthly_depreciation, ROUND((a.original_value * (1 - a.residual_rate)) / (a.useful_life * 12), 2) ) AS monthly_depreciation, COALESCE(r.accumulated_depreciation, a.accumulated_depreciation) AS accumulated_depreciation, COALESCE(r.net_value, a.net_value) AS net_value, a.status FROM asset a LEFT JOIN asset_category c ON c.id = a.category_id LEFT JOIN depreciation_record r ON r.asset_id = a.id AND r.depreciation_month = #{month} WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.status NOT IN ('scrapped') ORDER BY a.department, a.asset_code

SELECT a.department, COUNT(*) AS assetCount, SUM(a.original_value) AS originalValueTotal, SUM(a.accumulated_depreciation) AS accumulatedDepreciationTotal, SUM(a.net_value) AS netValueTotal, SUM(ROUND((a.original_value * (1 - a.residual_rate)) / (a.useful_life * 12), 2)) AS monthlyDepreciation FROM asset a WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.status NOT IN ('scrapped') GROUP BY a.department ORDER BY SUM(a.original_value) DESC

SELECT c.id AS categoryId, c.category_name, COUNT(a.id) AS assetCount, SUM(a.original_value) AS originalValueTotal, SUM(a.accumulated_depreciation) AS accumulatedDepreciationTotal, SUM(a.net_value) AS netValueTotal, SUM(ROUND((a.original_value * (1 - a.residual_rate)) / (a.useful_life * 12), 2)) AS monthlyDepreciation FROM asset_category c LEFT JOIN asset a ON a.category_id = c.id AND a.deleted = 0 AND a.status NOT IN ('scrapped') GROUP BY c.id, c.category_name HAVING COUNT(a.id) > 0 ORDER BY SUM(a.original_value) DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS assetCount, COALESCE(SUM(original_value), 0) AS totalOriginalValue, COALESCE(SUM(net_value), 0) AS totalNetValue, COALESCE(SUM(accumulated_depreciation), 0) AS totalAccumulatedDepreciation FROM asset WHERE deleted = 0 AND status NOT IN ('SCRAPPED')

SELECT id AS assetId, asset_code, asset_name, department, original_value, net_value, ROUND(net_value / original_value, 4) AS netValueRate, status FROM asset WHERE deleted = 0 AND status NOT IN ('SCRAPPED') AND original_value > 0 AND net_value / original_value < 0.1 ORDER BY netValueRate ASC

SELECT id AS assetId, asset_code, asset_name, purchase_date, useful_life, PERIOD_DIFF(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m'), DATE_FORMAT(purchase_date, '%Y%m')) AS usedMonths, useful_life * 12 - PERIOD_DIFF(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m'), DATE_FORMAT(purchase_date, '%Y%m')) AS remainingMonths, status FROM asset WHERE deleted = 0 AND status NOT IN ('SCRAPPED') AND useful_life IS NOT NULL AND purchase_date IS NOT NULL AND useful_life * 12 - PERIOD_DIFF(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m'), DATE_FORMAT(purchase_date, '%Y%m')) < 12 ORDER BY remainingMonths ASC

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(original_value * (1 - residual_rate) / (useful_life * 12)), 0) FROM asset WHERE deleted = 0 AND status NOT IN ('SCRAPPED') AND original_value > 0 AND useful_life > 0 AND residual_rate IS NOT NULL
